message:
feat: expand conformance harness, privacy-learning contract, and storage adapter tests

- conformance_harness: extend with additional boundary validation logic
- privacy_learning_contract: major expansion (~1000 lines) of the privacy
  learning contract module with comprehensive privacy constraints
- storage_adapter tests: add 4 new deterministic-canonicalization tests
  covering frankensqlite query ordering, replay state determinism,
  migration receipt matching, and WAL order variant handling
- governance_audit_ledger_lifecycle: new lifecycle test suite for the
  governance audit ledger

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
